data.title: EDAP TMS Strengthens Market Position with Landmark HIFI-2 Data Supporting Focal One® Robotic HIFU in Radiorecurrent Prostate Cancer
data.description: On April 30, 2026, medical technology company EDAP TMS announced significant progress in enhancing their market presence. They released groundbreaking results from the HIFI-2 study, which provided strong support for the effectiveness of their Focal One ® Robotic HIFU system in treating radiorecurrent prostate cancer. This data is expected to solidify EDAP TMS's position in the market as a leader in innovative medical solutions.

data.title: Versana Closes $43 Million Capital Raise Led by BNP Paribas with Fitch Ventures, MassMutual Ventures, Motive Partners and Apollo Joining as Investors
data.description: Versana, a platform based in New York, has recently completed a capital raise of $43 million. The funding round was primarily led by BNP Paribas, with additional investments from Fitch Ventures and MassMutual. The company plans to utilize this new investment to expand its operations into Europe, as well as strengthen its presence in private credit and data analytics sectors.

data.title: Wellspect HealthCare Expands Surity™ Portfolio in the U.S. with Surity™ Male External Catheter for Urinary Incontinence Care
data.description: In MÖLNDAL, Sweden on April 30, 2026, Wellspect HealthCare introduced the Surity™ Male External Catheter, providing men suffering from urinary incontinence with a non-invasive remedy. This new product expands the company's range of dependable urinary incontinence management solutions, reinforcing its commitment to addressing this issue.

data.title: Teva’s 2025 Healthy Future Report Highlights Environmental and Access to Medicines Progress, Including Meeting All Sustainability-Linked Bond Targets
data.description: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on April 30, 2026, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA) released its 2025 Healthy Future Report. This report detailed the company's achievements in meeting its sustainability goals, which are centered around key issues for its operations, patients, and the environment. Teva exceeded all the sustainability targets set for its sustainability-linked bonds, which amounted to around $7.5 billion from its 2021 and 2023 releases. These accomplishments signify advancements in crucial areas such as climate initiatives, promoting health equality, and improving access to medications. The company's efforts demonstrate the integration of financial and sustainability performance.

data.title: Barfresh to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on May 14, 2026
data.description: Barfresh Food Group Inc., a leading supplier of frozen beverages, disclosed plans to reveal its first quarter performance on May 14, 2026, at 1:30 pm PT (4:30 pm ET). The announcement will be made by the Company on that day. For those in North America, the dial-in number is (877) 407-4018, and for international callers, it is (201) 689-8471.

data.title: Factor Bioscience to Showcase Engineered iMacrophages (FACT-112) Targeting Ovarian Cancer In Vivo at ISCT 2026
data.description: Factor Bioscience Inc., a biotechnology company based in Cambridge, is set to disclose the most recent pre-clinical findings regarding FACT-112. This program involves utilizing engineered iMacrophages to target solid tumors. The company, known for its innovative gene-editing technology, will present the data on April 30, 2026. This announcement is eagerly awaited in the scientific community for potential breakthroughs in cancer treatment. The disclosed information could have significant implications for the future of treating solid tumors.

data.title: CW Bancorp Reports First Quarter 2026 EPS of $1.18, up 22%
data.description: In Irvine, California, as of April 30, 2026, CW Bancorp (trading as CWBK on OTCQX) disclosed that its parent company saw consolidated net income reach $3,496,000 in the first quarter of 2026, translating to $1.18 per diluted share. This is a rise from the previous year's $2,935,000 in net income, which equated to $0.97 per share. CW Bancorp is the overseeing entity of CommerceWest Bank.

data.title: AVAX One Advances Alberta AI/HPC Powered Land Program; Confirms Behind-the-Meter Natural Gas Infrastructure Model and Expanded Site Pipeline
data.description: A 10-megawatt Tier 3 site in Alberta is set to play a key role in a larger land development initiative focused on generating power. BlueFlare Energy Solutions Inc. has been chosen to assist in the infrastructure development for the site. Currently, the process of selecting an owner's engineer is in progress.

data.title: Icons in Ink Debuts in Cleveland as a Landmark Exhibition of Comic Art and History
data.description: The exhibition Icons in Ink: The Jewish Comics Experience has expanded beyond New York to include Cleveland's significant influence on the medium. Opening in Cleveland on April 30, 2026, the Maltz Museum presents this unique showcase. It delves into the Jewish impact on comics and highlights the enduring legacy of Cleveland in this artistic realm. This landmark exhibition explores how Jewish culture has shaped the comic industry.

data.title: Pragmatic Economics: Alabama Poised to Become Major Winner of Global Economic Transformation Driven by AI, Robotics, and Space Economy, Economists Argue in New Opinion Column
data.description: With a strong foothold in aerospace, manufacturing, and robotics, Alabama stands poised to become one of the most prosperous areas worldwide. Experts predict that as artificial intelligence, robotics, and the space economy continue to reshape the global arena, Alabama's economic fortunes are set to soar. The state's strategic focus on these industries positions it well for significant wealth accumulation in the coming years. The potential for growth and advancement in these sectors underscores Alabama's promising economic outlook.

data.title: CELEBRATE MOM AT BRAVO! WITH A SPECIAL DAY OUT & A $25 GIFT
data.description: Beginning at 10 am in Orlando, Florida on April 30, 2026, families can show their love for Mom by coming together at Bravo! Italian Kitchen. On Sunday, May 10, 2026, families can participate in a special event filled with delicious Italian cuisine and friendly service.

data.title: SmartAC Expands AI Leadership with Senior Engineering Team Led by CTO Matt Robillard
data.description: Matt Robillard, an experienced technology professional, has been appointed as the Chief Technology Officer (CTO) for SmartAC. Under his leadership, a senior team specializing in artificial intelligence (AI) and data engineering is being established to advance the platform's innovation and predictive intelligence features. The company is based in Houston and is progressing rapidly in this regard as of April 30, 2026.

data.title: Justt Named to 2026 Forbes Fintech 50 List for AI-Powered Chargeback Automation
data.description: Justt has made history by being the inaugural chargeback and dispute management firm to be included in the prestigious Forbes Fintech 50 list, showcasing the sector's rise as fundamental fintech infrastructure. Based in TEL AVIV, Israel and with the news announced on April 30, 2026, Justt is an AI-powered chargeback automation platform with over [insert number] clients.
TrendForce raised its 2Q server DRAM contract price forecast from +43–48% QoQ to +45–50% QoQ.

data.title: DiaMedica Therapeutics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Provide a Business Update May 7, 2026
data.description: DiaMedica Therapeutics Inc (Nasdaq: DMAC) a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company concentrating on innovative treatments for preeclampsia, fetal growth restriction, and acute ischemic stroke (AIS) disclosed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial outcomes post-market closure on Wednesday, May 6th. A live conference call has been scheduled for Thursday, May 7th at 8:00 AM Eastern Time/7:00 AM Central Time to discuss business updates.
Studio City International Holdings Limited Announces Unaudited First Quarter 2026 Earnings

data.title: Melco Resorts Announces Unaudited First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: Melco Resorts & Entertainment Limited (Nasdaq: MLCO), a leading developer, owner, and operator of integrated resort facilities in Asia and Europe, announced its unaudited financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The report was released on April 30, 2026, in Macau.

data.title: High School Innovators and Entrepreneurs Named Pete Conrad Scholars at the 2026 Space Center Houston Conrad Challenge, Presented by Equinor
data.description: In the 2026 season, students hailing from over 70 nations worked together remotely on a vast array of projects, totaling to more than 1,500 initiatives. These collaborations focused on creating groundbreaking solutions in various fields including Aerospace & Aviation, Cyber-Technology & Security, Energy & Environment. These endeavors were made possible through sponsorship from Equinor among others.

data.title: Stratasys Recognized with Multiple Industry Awards for Additive Manufacturing Innovation and Sustainability Leadership
data.description: In Minnetonka, Minnesota and Rehovot, Israel, Stratasys Ltd. (NASDAQ: SSYS) has received numerous accolades at the 2026 RAPID + TCT conference, the largest additive manufacturing and industrial 3D printing gathering in North America. The awards highlight Stratasys' achievements in real-world applications of additive manufacturing, as well as its leadership in environmental, social, and governance (ESG) initiatives. A collaboration between Stratasys and Addion GmbH also secured a prestigious TCT Award.
BoE's Ramsden: Will act as necessary to get inflation to 2%.
